title: mertensia glauca
intro: Mertensia glauca, also known as bluebells or lungwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Mertensia glauca include reducing inflammation, improving breathing, and aiding in the treatment of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Mertensia glauca can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy consumption of its medicinal properties.
